arts.ttl: Monday's Transfer Talk Update: Raphinha, Ayyoub Bouaddi, Andre Onana
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Harry Amass makes Manchester United dressing room admission after long-awaited debut
arts.sum: Harry Amass made his Man United debut against Leicester City on Sunday night, appearing as a second half substitute.

arts.ttl: What Rasmus Hojlund has been doing 'behind the scenes' as he makes exciting Man United prediction
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund ended his long wait for a goal after scoring Man United's opener in their 3-0 win at Leicester City on Sunday night.

arts.ttl: I saw what two Manchester United players did before Leicester City game that proved telling
arts.sum: Man Utd beat Leicester City 3-0 at the King Power Stadium on a night when two players ended long goal droughts.

arts.ttl: Manchester United reveal bold fitness plan for rest of the season
arts.sum: Having beaten Leicester City, Man United do not play again until April 1 away at Nottingham Forest in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim heaps praise on Rasmus Hojlund after goal-shy striker ends scoring drought with tidy finish against Leicester... and admits it's a 'shame' momentum is forced to stop due to the international break
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ruben Amorim paid tribute to Rasmus Hojlund after the Manchester United striker ended his marathon goal drought in the win at Leicester on Sunday night.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer news latest: European giant set to 'bid' for winger in summer transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly set to receive an offer from a European giant for one of their wingers, with the club desperately needing to raise funds.

arts.ttl: FPL notes: Bruno hauls, Heaven injury + Leicester’s awful run
arts.sum: What we saw at the King Power Stadium The post FPL notes: Bruno hauls, Heaven injury + Leicester’s awful run appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes concerning Ayden Heaven injury admission after huge Man Utd scare
arts.sum: Manchester United claimed a welcome win away at Leicester City in the Premier League but it was marred by an injury to Ayden Heaven which saw the defender taken off on a stretcher

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists his Man United side are still 'SO far away' from the standards he demands... despite their 3-0 triumph over Leicester
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim admitted Manchester United are still a huge distance from the standard demanded by their fans despite their second win in four days.
